mission.title: atlantis: Autodownloading Terraform 1.8.2 breaks Atlantis entirely
mission.description: Autodownloading Terraform 1.8.2 breaks Atlantis entirely. This issue affects 193+ users.

steps.title: Identify atlantis troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your atlantis deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis -n atlantis --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review atlantis configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant atlantis configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis
kubectl get configmap -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=atlantis
```

steps.title: Apply the fix for Autodownloading Terraform 1.8.2 breaks Atlantis entirely
steps.description:
## what

Short-term fix for #4471. With this change Atlantis will only download terraform version `1.8.1` or lower, still respecting constraints set in `required_version` field. If `required_version` is set to `>=1.8.2` or higher Atlantis will fallback to default version. 

## why

Terraform
```yaml
downloading terraform version 1.8.2 at "https://releases.hashicorp.com/terraform/1.8.2/terraform_1.8.2_linux_amd64.zip?checksum=file:https://releases.hashicorp.com/terraform/1.8.2/terraform_1.8.2_SHA256SUMS": expected a single file: /tmp/getter1796155136/archive
```

steps.title: Upgrade atlantis to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade atlantis:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade atlantis atlantis/atlantis --namespace atlantis
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n atlantis
helm list -n atlantis
```

steps.title: Confirm Autodownloading Terraform 1.8.2 breaks Atlantis… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis -n atlantis --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n atlantis --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
## what

Short-term fix for #4471. With this change Atlantis will only download terraform version `1.8.1` or lower, still respecting constraints set in `required_version` field. If `required_version` is set to `>=1.8.2` or higher Atlantis will fallback to default version.
codeSnippets: downloading terraform version 1.8.2 at "https://releases.hashicorp.com/terraform/1.8.2/terraform_1.8.2_linux_amd64.zip?checksum=file:https://releases.hashicorp.com/terraform/1.8.2/terraform_1.8.2_SHA256SUMS": expected a single file: /tmp/getter1796155136/archive

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with atlantis installed or the issue environment reproducible.
